rules.rule_text:
rule PythoRAT
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/PythoRAT"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$a = "TKeylogger"
		$b = "uFileTransfer"
		$c = "TTDownload"
		$d = "SETTINGS"
		$e = "Unknown" wide
		$f = "#@#@#"
		$g = "PluginData"
		$i = "OnPluginMessage"

	condition:
		all of them
}
